tracks.meaning: the hard outer covering of an egg, nut, or seed
to remove the shell or outer covering from something
a metal projectile filled with explosives, designed to be fired from a large gun or cannon
a command-line interface or program that interprets user commands and interacts with an operating system
the outer walls or structural framework of a building before interior finishing
a light racing boat or rowboat with a narrow hull
an outer layer or surface that conceals something beneath
the outer casing or housing of an electronic device or machine
a company or organization created as a front for illicit or fraudulent activities
the outer casing of a drum that holds the drumhead in place
the structure of a stage set without scenery or furnishings
